headline: FLOOR-LIMITED CONFIRMATION + METHODOLOGY-NOTE CANDIDATE. Composite 0 (true floor) holds. April 15 four-year anniversary of war anchored extensive in-window reporting: 65% of population (34M) in urgent humanitarian need; 14M displaced; death toll 150K-400K; child casualties from drones up sharply Q1 2026. April 27 Al Jazeera: thousands held by RSF in el-Fasher. OHCHR April 'Three Years of War' report. OCHA HNRP April 2026 — $3B aid plan critically underfunded. Stimson Center: crisis 'marginalized in global system'. April 28 UNSC Resolution 1591 sanctions designations added (already in prior cycle). Methodology-note candidate — floor-limitation gap continues.

methodologyNote: Sudan composite is 0 (true scoring floor). Each dimension at 1.0.
